workLog.task: Issue #1877 AC-1: build the variance-control harness to quantify Anthropic API determinism at temperature=0 on long context
workLog.outcome: Added scripts/eval/variance-control.py: runs N reps of one (fixture, agent) at temperature=0, computes verdict distribution, pass-rate variance, and normalized-Levenshtein response-text variance, and classifies the result against the issue's three branches. Reuses _scoring_engine._VERDICT_RE and AnthropicAPIAdapter; pure metrics are independently tested. AC-2 to AC-4 (live F002 run, committed report, ADR-058 note) require API spend and are left as the maintainer's deliberate step.
workLog.evidence: uv run pytest -> 30 passed; ruff clean; dry-run plan prints with no API calls

nextSteps: Maintainer runs the live F002 control (AC-2 to AC-4) with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and commits the report + ADR-058 note
